intent: Isaac in the classroom — his fascination with who reads and writes the prediction (the pruning seed, no mechanism words spoken), a choice for Caden, and a close that reacts to Caden's stated conviction. Sets isaac.slate_curiosity.

n0.text: You keep looking at the prediction-board like it'll blink first. It won't. But someone read it, and someone wrote it down. That's the part worth staring at.

n1.text: Weaver, for me. Everyone else wants to obey the Road well. I want to know who gets to decide what it says.

choices.label: Careful. That sounds like doubting the Road.
Someone should understand it. Why not you?

react_doubt.text: I don't doubt it. I just don't want to be the last to know what it's already decided. Neither should you.

react_encouraged.text: Why not me. Remember you said that — someday it might matter that someone did.

conv_protect.text: Though — 'keep people safe', you told Vec. Safe assumes someone already chose who's worth the saving. You should ask who.

conv_purpose.text: You'll go find what you're for. I'll go find who decides it. Fair split, I think.

conv_none.text: Anyway. Watch the Fair tomorrow. Watch the people running it, not the tricks.
